categories.topic_template:
Please note this section is for general discussion/chat about Elixir when a dedicated section or thread for that topic does not exist (you may want to do a quick search before posting - there's a good chance a thread already exists about the topic).

Here are some common threads or sections that should be used:

Articles/blog posts > https://elixirforum.com/c/blogs-podcasts/blogs/60
Podcasts > https://elixirforum.com/c/blogs-podcasts/podcasts/156
Sharing livestreams > https://elixirforum.com/t/elixir-livestreams/62256
Introductions thread > https://elixirforum.com/t/hello-elixir-world-introductions-thread/71
Sharing small updates > https://elixirforum.com/t/what-elixir-related-stuff-are-you-doing/113
Jobs > https://elixirforum.com/c/work/elixir-jobs/16
Book/Education sales > https://elixirforum.com/t/elixir-book-learning-resources-sales-discounts-thread/2158
Questions about Phoenix > https://elixirforum.com/c/phoenix-forum/phoenix-questions/31
Seeking Mentorship Thread > https://elixirforum.com/t/seeking-mentorship-thread/71922
BEAM Language/s Chat > https://elixirforum.com/t/beam-chat-news/62481

categories.topic_template:
PLEASE READ BEFORE POSTING

Firstly, please post all Phoenix related questions in the Phoenix Help section, thank you!

This section is for questions or help relating to something you are or will be working on. If you need help with homework or some other theoretical problem please use the Homework Help/Theory section. 

- When posting please ensure the thread title acts as a short summary of your thread (it should include what your thread is about *along with* what you may be asking or needing help with). Titles should provide enough info so that others can get a good idea what you are asking or what you need help with without having to click on it. If you need to add 'Question about...' or 'Need help..' or similar in the title this is a good indication the title is not adequate (all threads in this section are questions or things people need help with). Please also do not add any unnecessary/superfluous commentary or opinions in the title (we just need the title to contain details about the problem you are facing or what you need help with).

- Please ensure your thread is formatted correctly using Markdown formatting (use three backticks on a line before/after code blocks).

- Please include enough information so that we get a complete picture of what you require/are asking. Please also include what you’ve tried to solve the problem. 

- If your question is related to Phoenix, Nerves, NX, Membrane, FireFly, or Scenic, please post in their respective sections.

Thanks! :smiley:
categories.name: Questions / Help

categories.topic_template:
Please add a minimum of two tags, one of which should include: `ash-questions` (for questions/help topics) or `ash-chat` (for general Ash chat).  Please do not use the `ash-news` tag unless you are an Ash core team member. 

**Please also ensure your title acts as a short summary of the thread - it should contain enough information for people to get an idea what the thread is about (or what your question is if you are asking for help) without having to click on it.**

Thank you! :D
